description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines a single job named pages (in the default stage) using the default Docker image. The job sets the variable GIT_DEPTH to 1, runs the shell commands "mkdir -p public/" and "mv fdroid public/", and publishes the public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact. The job has no specific rules, services, caches, or additional deployment targets and runs on every pipeline execution.
